title: cynanchum molle
intro: Cynanchum molle, also known as Chinese Swallowwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family, native to China and other parts of Asia. Traditionally, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Cynanchum molle include relieving pain and inflammation, reducing anxiety and stress, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, or dried and made into capsules, allowing for its active compounds to be effectively extracted and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
